title: Celestial Bonds
synonyms: พันธะสวรรค์
synopsis: A hundred years ago, immortal Tian Quan kills the Mirage Lord in a battle, and the Mirage Spirit disappears from the land of Cangshuo. However, Tian Quan's soul becomes incomplete and she loses the memory of the battle. After the battle, Tian Quan goes down to the mortal world to work on the land of Cangshuo and adopts the immortal pet bird Li Xiao. Li Xiao quickly transforms into human form, and Tian Quan is moved by how similar Li Xiao’s appearance and behavior are to her former lover Shao Weili. Li Xiao is born with the ability to identify hundreds of herbs, and he goes out to treat illnesses and save people on Tian Quan's behalf. After Tian Quan realizes that Li Xiao has not returned home for days, she goes to Luoyi Town to look for him. To her surprise, all the people in Luoyi Town are killed and the Mirage Spirit has re-appeared. Tian Quan and Li Xiao work together to fight against the Mirage and resolves the town’s crisis. As the Tian Quan regains her chaotic memories, she disco

title: Love Magic Grocery
synopsis: Crazy things are happening throughout the city—a Saiyan is suddenly holding his girlfriend hostage, a missing wife has turned into a happy woman and the reason for all this is… The "Ultimate Love Bazaar" that claims they can solve any love-related problems?!! And the one selling all these love problem-solving items is a very crafty witch that can go through different dimensions?! A cold-faced and serious policeman was just doing his job and… This charming love hotpot is boiling; would you like to have a taste, dear customer? (Source: Comikey, edited)

title: EMBERS
synonyms: เงาแค้นสองเส้นทาง
synopsis: In a quiet village, a young boy named Duanmu Yeyu was once saved by the elite “Hell Hunters” of Ember City. Deeply inspired by these heroes, he vowed to one day become a Hell Hunter himself. As he boards a bus to Ember City to chase his dream, Yeyu is unknowingly swept into a storm of chaos. The main antagonist, Lucifer, sends a bioengineered operative named MIKO-Taiyi to infiltrate Ember City and steal classified data. During a fierce battle with the Hell Hunters, Taiyi is severely injured and falls unconscious. Yeyu stumbles upon Taiyi and, unaware of Taiyi's identity, brings Taiyi back to the Hell Hunters’ base for treatment. In the process, Yeyu unintentionally takes a critical mission device from Taiyi. As Yeyu begins his long-awaited trial to join the Hell Hunters, his innocent act sets off a chain reaction. Taiyi, desperate to avoid detection by Ember City forces, must covertly approach Yeyu and retrieve the device. Meanwhile, Lucifer dispatches tens of thousands of minions to l

title: Fatal Rule
synonyms: เกมนรกโลกเส้นตาย
synopsis: Qiao Jingting, having unexpectedly enter the abyss game to avoid enslavement, forms an alliance with the vengeful veteran player Shu Ai and the mysterious youth Bai Er against the evil ruler Han Bin and his organization, Heart Moon Fox. After a life-and-death struggle, just when they believe they are about to achieve victory, they discover they have fallen into Han Bin's trap, facing a desperate situation. Even more frightening is that with this failure, the trust among the three quickly collapses. In a critical moment, the arrival of the super expert and rough man Zou Yidao changes the power dynamics in the entire novice village and brings a glimmer of hope for escape to Qiao Jingting and his companions. Unfortunately, the trio soon realizes that Zou Yidao, who managed to escape the crisis, seems to lack a clear sense of good and evil compared to Han Bin and only cares about his own goals. Moreover, at this moment, he seems to have reached some kind of "deal" with Han Bin. In the incr

title: Wu Xing Zhan Shen
synopsis: A god-killing sword was obtained by Shi Huang, a young man from a small town, and he has since taken on the responsibility of saving the world. After enrolling in Tianbei College, Shi Huang rises up to resist the influence of his family. In order to protect the empire, he goes into danger alone. (Source: iQIYI, translated)

title: Feng Huo Zhan Ji
synopsis: In the future, a new regime has been established on a human alien planet. However, a rebel force of robots has risen up and taken over an important mining town under human control. In order to eliminate the leader of the enemy, the commander of the Intelligence Center, Blast Wind, sent his younger brother, Starfire, on a mission to the mining town. Unexpectedly, the mission fails, and since then, the two brothers find that things are starting to develop in a direction they never envisioned, and a huge conspiracy surfaces, upending their perceptions of the world, their enemies, and their comrades, and when they come to their senses, the once-brothers are now on the opposite side of each other. ...... (Source: iQIYI)

title: Cheng Ye Xiao He
synopsis: Xiao He, a famous player in an online game, once defeated a female thief in the game. Surprisingly, the female thief is a former top-class e-sports player! What makes her end up like this? The two strangers always come across each other without knowing it. What will happen to them in the digital life? (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Baijia Jue: Jianghu Gui Shi Lu
titleRomaji: Baijia Jue: Jianghu Gui Shi Lu
synopsis: In the future city, science and robots have become necessities in people's lives. The research, development and use of technology maintain a delicate balance between the scientific ethics committee, the technology chaebol, and the third-party security system company Mosh. Wang Xiaoyun, the only son of the Wang Group, was assassinated by an illegal robot while he was out hunting. Everyone in his entourage was spared. The balance of power has been broken, and the undercurrent is surging. Bai Wuxie, captain of the 24th Operation Team in charge of public security, found Zhang Bingyi and Shang Weiyang, consultants who are good at mechanical networks, to assist in the investigation. After several on-site investigations, it was discovered that the murderer turned out to be a product of the "robot oligarchy" Aibozer Company. At the same time, Mosh also encountered a security crisis, and everything seemed to be driven by someone behind the scenes. Zhang Bingyi, Bai Wuxie and Mo Shangshuang from

title: Rising in the Fire
synopsis: The first fire-themed anime series in China. It mainly tells the moving story of Han Yan, the head of Feiliu Fire Station, and a group of young people including Jiang Mingsheng, Ning Wei, and Fan Haoyuan, who burn their youth and blood and fight on the front line of firefighting. Not only are there high-energy moments of fire rescue, but also the fire brigade that is extremely brave in wartime and extremely cute in leisure time, as well as fascinating suspense cases and hard-core firefighting knowledge! Show a different kind of passionate youth~ (Source: iQIYI, translated)

title: Shuangsheng Wu Hun
synopsis: Lin Fan, who was born in a noble family in Dalin County, was originally a peerless genius who was awarded the Tianjiao Order, but his martial soul was taken away by his fiancée, and he became a waste. When a mysterious demon parasitized Lin Fan and reactivated his abandoned martial soul, making him a rare dual martial soul physique, Lin Fan officially embarked on the road to rise, from a small county town to the heavens and the worlds. (Source: Tencent, translated)

title: Ascendants of the Nine Suns
synopsis: In his previous life, Ye Yunfei was gifted, but his martial veins suddenly closed and he could not practice martial arts. He was ridiculed by his family, betrayed by his fiancee, and encircled by various families. The young Ye Yunfei was deserted by his friends, bullied, sadly left by his beloved, and his father died tragically in battle. Fortunately, the Purple Saint True Lord who passed by Yunyou took him in as his disciple. Ye Yuntian grew up to be the youngest emperor in history, but was attacked when he was crossing the calamity. He was reborn when all the martial veins were lost, but it was also a passionate youth. Meeting his old relatives, friends, and lovers again, facing everything familiar, Ye Yunfei, a generation of emperor, chose to start over. There is still a trace of the soul of the emperor in his body, so that the memory of the previous life can be preserved intact. title: Demon's Ascension
synopsis: What happens when an outlaw teenager who grows up evil steps into the world of immortalism? Immortals and demons, life and death are not in the hands of heaven. Let's watch him swim upstream and become a legend in a world where people and demons stand side by side, and where demons and ghosts run rampant. (Source: iQIYI, translated)

title: A Moment but Forever
synonyms: ขณะหนึ่งชั่วนิจนิรันดร์ (อนิเมะ)
ตำนานเทพธิดาอู๋ซวง
synopsis: In ancient times, Ji Tanyin, a mortal Yanshi, relied on her Heaven-Defying Mechanism ability to construct the Heaven and Earth Mechanism, and then rose to become a peerless goddess, maintaining the order of the Three Realms in the God Realm. However, the divine world was suddenly bathed in blood by the demons. Wushuang sacrificed her “God’s Heart” to create the ultimate artifact “God’s Hand” and wiped out the demons in one fell swoop. However, the “God’s Hand” was unexpectedly lost in the human realm. The Heaven and Earth Mechanism stopped working, and the divine world withered away. Wushuang, who lost her “heart”, became a mortal maiden and descended to the human realm in search of God’s Hand. She counterattacked High Priest Youhu. After experiencing peerless love, she used the Heaven-Defying Mechanism to counterattack everyone. She eliminated the demons and resolved the disputes of the Three Realms in one fell swoop, saving the world and all living beings. (Source: iQIYI)
